mapper.select:
select src.channel_id as channelId, src.site_code as siteCode, src.status, ssrc.recharge_way_id as wayId from site_recharge_channel src join system_recharge_channel ssrc on src.channel_id = ssrc.id where src.site_code = #{siteCode} and ssrc.recharge_way_id in
#{wayId}

select c.channel_id channelId, s.recharge_way_id rechargeWayId, s.channel_code channelCode from site_recharge_channel c left join system_recharge_channel s on s.id = c.channel_id where c.site_code = #{siteCode}

SELECT a.status AS status, a.sort_order AS sortOrder, a.recv_user_name AS recvUserName, a.recv_bank_code AS recvBankCode, a.recv_bank_name AS recvBankName, a.recv_bank_branch AS recvBankBranch, a.recv_bank_card AS recvBankCard, a.recv_bank_account AS recvBankAccount, a.recv_qr_code AS recvQrCode, a.creator AS creator, a.created_time AS createdTime, a.updater AS updater, a.updated_time AS updatedTime, b.recharge_channel_no AS rechargeChannelNo, b.id AS id, b.currency_code AS currencyCode, b.channel_code AS channelCode, b.channel_type AS channelType, b.recharge_type_id AS rechargeTypeId, b.recharge_way_id AS rechargeWayId, b.channel_name AS channelName, b.currency_code AS currencyCode, b.mer_no AS merNo, b.private_key AS privateKey, b.pub_key AS pubKey, b.secret_key AS secretKey, b.sort_order AS sortOrder, b.recharge_min AS rechargeMin, b.recharge_max AS rechargeMax, b.fee AS fee, b.use_scope AS useScope, b.weight AS weight, b.auth_num AS authNum, b.status AS status, b.api_url AS apiUrl, b.callback_url AS callbackUrl, b.use_scope AS vipRankUseScope, a.vip_grade_use_scope AS vipGradeUseScope
FROM site_recharge_channel a LEFT JOIN system_recharge_channel b ON b.id = a.channel_id where a.site_code = #{siteCode} AND a.status = 1 AND b.status = 1 ORDER BY a.sort_order ASC

SELECT b.recharge_channel_no AS rechargeChannelNo, b.id AS id, b.currency_code AS currencyCode, b.channel_code AS channelCode, b.channel_type AS channelType, b.recharge_type_id AS rechargeTypeId, b.recharge_way_id AS rechargeWayId, b.channel_name AS channelName, b.currency_code AS currencyCode, b.mer_no AS merNo, b.private_key AS privateKey, b.pub_key AS pubKey, b.secret_key AS secretKey, b.sort_order AS sortOrder, b.recharge_min AS rechargeMin, b.recharge_max AS rechargeMax, b.fee AS fee, b.use_scope AS useScope, b.weight AS weight, b.auth_num AS authNum, b.status AS status, b.api_url AS apiUrl, b.callback_url AS callbackUrl, a.recv_user_name AS recvUserName, a.recv_bank_code AS recvBankCode, a.recv_bank_name AS recvBankName, a.recv_bank_branch AS recvBankBranch, a.recv_bank_card AS recvBankCard, a.recv_bank_account AS recvBankAccount, a.recv_qr_code AS recvQrCode FROM site_recharge_channel a LEFT JOIN system_recharge_channel b ON b.id = a.channel_id where a.site_code = #{siteCode} AND a.status = 1 AND b.status = 1 AND b.currency_code = #{currencyCode} AND b.recharge_way_id = #{rechargeWayId} AND b.id = #{channelId}
